# Tools Collection

> A collection of free browser-based utility tools: fat loss calculator, dice
> roller with statistics, blood alcohol/medication level calculator, N26 bank
> transaction analyzer and a training planner. Frontend is a static Next.js
> export; calculations run against an optional Rust/Axum REST backend.

## Tools

- [Home — tool overview](https://ch3fulrich.github.io/Tools/): Grid of all available tools
- [Dice Roller](https://ch3fulrich.github.io/Tools/tools/dice): Roll arbitrary dice expressions with advantage/disadvantage, rerolls and full probability statistics (histogram, boxplot)
- [Fat Loss Calculator](https://ch3fulrich.github.io/Tools/tools/fat-loss): Estimate fat loss over time from caloric deficit and personal parameters
- [Blood Level Calculator](https://ch3fulrich.github.io/Tools/tools/bloodlevel): Estimate substance blood levels over time
- [N26 Transaction Analyzer](https://ch3fulrich.github.io/Tools/tools/n26): Analyze exported N26 bank CSV transactions locally
- [Timeline Editor](https://ch3fulrich.github.io/Tools/tools/timeline): Build and export interactive timelines
- [Training Planner](https://ch3fulrich.github.io/Tools/tools/training): Plan workouts and training schedules

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Ch3fUlrich/Tools): MIT-style monorepo with the Next.js frontend and Rust backend
